FNV PBR SHADOW SELECTION CONTINUITY CLOSURE

Required closure:
1. Prove source candidate ownership, filtering, rank inputs, and configured/effective cap.
2. Prove candidate list topology and every keep/remove/move/replace/fade action.
3. Recover x87 comparisons and equality behavior in FUN_00B5CDE0 from raw instructions.
4. Separate selection-distance, shadow-render, and active renderer camera provenance.
5. Prove ownership and cleanup of physical slots 0x11 through 0x14.
6. Trace camera +0x1A0 through projected rows 0x10 through 0x13 to final D3D sampler.
7. Determine whether candidate replacement is continuous and identify a safe fix point if not.

Do not conflate physical slot 0x11, PPLighting row 0x11, and image-space effect ID 0x11.
